Key.English: Used to treat gaping wounds and deep lacerations.
Used to treat gaping wounds and deep lacerations.
[UNSCI] Biomedical Foam
Increase heart rate and counter effects given by allergic reactions.

A drug that works on a sympathetic response to dilate the bronchi, increase heart rate and counter such effects given by allergic reactions (anaphylaxis). Used in sudden cardiac arrest scenarios with decreasing positive outcomes.
[UNSCI] Epinephrine Autoinjector
[UNSCI] MediGel (40ml)
Used to treat surface level wounds.
Used to treat surface level wounds.
[UNSCI] MediGel Canister
Use Medical Kit
Medical Kit to treat all combat inflicted wounds and injuries.
Medical Kit to treat all combat inflicted wounds and injuries.
[UNSCI] Medical Kit
Respawn Timer
Sets the time for the Medical Kit to respawn after use.
Used to combat moderate to severe pain experiences.
An analgesic used to combat moderate to severe pain experiences.
[UNSCI] Morphine Autoinjector
A sedative that can be used as a painkiller in small dosages.
Polypseudomorphine, as known as 'polly-sue,' is a sedative that can be used as a painkiller in small dosages.
[UNSCI] Polypseudomorphine Syringe
Contains a cocktail of drugs that are meant to wake up and energize the user.
Also known as a 'Stim Pack,' contains a cocktail of drugs that are meant to wake up and energize the user.
[UNSCI] Stimulant Autoinjector
